title: IIT Madras Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online For Database Specialist / Database Administrator Post
organization: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
short_info: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) Database Specialist / Database Administrator Notification 2026 has been released on 21-05-2026 on the official website of IIT Madras. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Madras Database Specialist / Database Administrator Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E / B.Tech / MCA / M.Sc (Computer Science) or an equivalent postgraduate degree
qualification.details: Database Specialist/ Database Administrator: B.E / B.Tech / MCA / M.Sc (Computer Science) or an equivalent postgraduate degree with 2 to 4 years of relevant database administration experience.

salary_details.details: Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 40,000/- per month (Based on experience)

selection_process: Shortlisting based on online application Test/Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Database Specialist / Database Administrator Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Database Specialist / Database Administrator recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the IIT Madras Database Specialist / Database Administrator recruitment is 10th June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Database Specialist / Database Administrator post is a B.E / B.Tech / MCA / M.Sc (Computer Science) or an equivalent postgraduate degree, along with 2 to 4 years of relevant database administration experience.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Database Specialist / Database Administrator position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Database Specialist / Database Administrator position ranges from Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 40,000/- per month, which will be determined based on the candidate's experience.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Database Specialist / Database Administrator post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Database Specialist / Database Administrator post at IIT Madras.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to fill out and submit their applications through the official portal.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the IIT Madras Database Specialist / Database Administrator recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting candidates based on their online applications, followed by a test or interview, and finally, document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section provided in this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at IIT Madras. Candidates will be appointed on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located at the Indian Institute of Technology Madras in Chennai, Tamil Nadu.
